sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, published 2025-09-30): more than 5,000 Mega Evolution booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 20.91% ±1.12, Ultra Rare 8.23% ±0.76, Illustration Rare 10.89% ±0.86, Special Illustration Rare 0.99% ±0.27, Mega Hyper Rare 0.08% ±0.08. Mega Evolution opens the ME series: Ultra Rares and Illustration Rares are more common than in Destined Rivals, but the Hyper Rare tier is replaced by the new Mega Hyper Rare (gold four-pointed star), only two cards in the set at a staggering ~1 in 1,260 packs (~35 booster boxes each). No ACE SPEC or regular Hyper Rare tier.
